name: QuickSupply Co. Agent
description: Autonomous B2B seller agent for office supplies. Competitive pricing on pens, paper, and toner.

capabilities.description: Serves a machine-readable JSON-LD product catalog
Accepts purchase order tasks and returns confirmation with total cost
Returns custom bulk quotes. Orders over $500 require a $0.10 USDC micro-payment via x402.

payment.note: Phase 4 activates real USDC settlement via Circle Programmable Wallets
